title: Build and test an authorization matrix
description: Enumerate (role × resource × action) cells and back each allowed and denied cell with a test before changing policy.
body: Steps: 1. List roles, resources, and actions in scope. 2. Fill the matrix marking each cell allow/deny per intended policy. 3. For each ALLOW cell write a positive test; for representative DENY cells write a negative test asserting refusal. 4. Run the suite, then make the policy change, then re-run. 5. Diff which cells changed and confirm none widened unintentionally. Rollback point: before editing the policy engine or middleware. Validation: the matrix tests are the gate; a policy change with no matrix delta test is unverified.
